ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code (UPC) of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the product (e.g., Nonfat, 1% Low fat) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the product (e.g., 1 Gallon, 1/2 Gallon) */,
  "lactose_free" INTEGER /* Whether the product is lactose-free */,
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of packaging (e.g., Plastic, Carton) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure (e.g., ounces, grams) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_package_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_type_id") REFERENCES package_types ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "recyclable" INTEGER /* Whether the package is recyclable */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the package (e.g., plastic, cardboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure (e.g., gallons, liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutritional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the nutritional information belongs to */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrate content per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content per serving */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size of the product */,
  "serving_size_unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for serving size (e.g., cups, ounces) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is stored */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Location of the product on the shelf */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store manager */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Store opening time */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Store closing time */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Store phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Store email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Warehouse phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Warehouse email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the supplier was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
